title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Super King Fitted Sheet (180x200 cm) - Soft Polycotton Fabric - Anti Allergic - Fade Resistant Bed Linen - Elasticated 25cm Deep Plain Bed Bottom Sheet, White
features: PRODUCT DIMENSIONS - Superking fitted sheet measuring (180 x 200 cm) with a 25 cm (10 inch) depth, designed to perfectly fit a Superking mattress
PREMIUM MATERIAL COMPOSITION - Made from a durable 50% Cotton & 50% Polyester blend, this superking bedding combines softness, comfort, and long-lasting strength.
SECURE ELASTIC CORNERS - The strong elastic all around ensures the super king fitted sheet stays in place, providing a snug fit and effortless bed-making.
SUPER SOFT & SMOOTH - Crafted with tightly woven, high-density fine yarns for a luxuriously soft, smooth, and breathable finish - premium quality bedding & linen for everyday comfort.
EASY CARE INSTRUCTIONS - Machine washable at 40℃. Wash dark coloured bedsheets separately. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low to maintain long-lasting freshness of your bedsheets.
